subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My glory! The mention of Jinab-i-'Andalib, upon him be My glory, hath been observed. His praise is through the fire of the love of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی ذکر جناب عندلیب علیه بهائی مشاهده شد ثنایش بنار محبت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
